description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage named report. Define a job for each team (e.g., accessibility-team-summary, acquisition-team-summary, activation-team-summary, ai_framework-team-summary, analytics_instrumentation-team-summary, anti-abuse-team-summary, api-team-summary, authentication-team-summary, authorization-team-summary, build-team-summary, etc.) that extends the shared .run template, runs in the report stage, and sets the variable TRIAGE_POLICY_FILE to the corresponding policies/generated/team-summary.yml.erb/<team>.yml file. Each job uses rules: if $EXCLUDE_TRIAGE_TEAM_SUMMARY_<TEAM> is true then never run; otherwise run when $TRIAGE_TEAM_SUMMARY is true or $TRIAGE_TEAM_SUMMARY_<TEAM> is true. The jobs inherit all scripts and environment from the .run template, so no explicit script commands are listed in the jobs themselves.
